title: psila tenella
intro: Psila tenella, also known as Devil's Claw, is a plant species in the family Pedaliaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Psila tenella include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Psila tenella can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as capsules, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
